title: Catalog
imageFallbackDescription: If not specified, the image from the global catalog will be used
inactiveProductsDescription: Inactive products do not appear in the menu
customizeNameHint: You can customize the name for your business
activateProductNote: This product will be linked to the TOGO global catalog. Image and description will be inherited automatically.
subtitle: Manage your products and categories

products.title: Products
products.createDescription: Create a new product for your catalog
products.noProductsDescription: Start by adding your first product to the catalog
products.name: Name

empty.title: You don't have products yet

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Organize your products into categories
categories.name: Name
categories.emptyDescription: Create categories to better organize your products and facilitate navigation for your customers.
categories.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
categories.deleteWarning: Note: You cannot delete this category if it has associated products.
categories.slugHelp: URL-friendly identifier for the category (e.g.: beverages-soft-drinks)
categories.createDescription: Create a new category for your catalog
categories.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your filters or clear them to see all categories
categories.slugDisabled: Slug cannot be edited after creation

import.title: Import products
import.description: Bulk import products from an Excel file

empty.title: Catalog complete
empty.message: You have activated all available products from the global catalog.

delete.title: Delete product?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. The product "{name}" will be permanently deleted.

activate.title: Activate product?
activate.description: The product "{name}" will be available to customers.

activateModal.title: Activate Product
activateModal.description: Configure how "{name}" will appear in your catalog

noBusiness.title: You don't have a business assigned
noBusiness.description: To manage products, you need to have a business assigned to your account. Contact the system administrator.
